fields.name: Sales Quotes - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales quotes that are not yet converted to invoices or orders.

fields.name: Sales Orders - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales orders that are not fully posted.

fields.name: Sales Return Orders - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales return orders documents that are displayed in the Sales Cue on the Role Center. The documents are filtered by today's date.

fields.name: Sales Credit Memos - Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of sales credit memos that are not yet posted.

fields.name: Sales Inv. - Pending Doc.Exch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales invoices that await sending to the customer through the document exchange service.

fields.name: Sales CrM. - Pending Doc.Exch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies sales credit memos that await sending to the customer through the document exchange service.
